variant: build me a full skincare starter guide: a product table, a timeline, a checklist, and key stats

request.message: build me a full skincare starter guide: a product table, a timeline, a checklist, and key stats

response_body.response:
now i'll build out your full starter guide:

**your oily skin + texture concerns need a barrier-first approach.** most beginners stack too many actives and wreck their skin. the plan below keeps it simple: one active at a time, focus on hydration and protection, then layer in treatment as your skin adapts.

products.name: CeraVe Foaming Facial Cleanser
products.description: Foaming yet non-stripping — for oily/acne-prone skin types.

products.name: The Ordinary Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1%
products.description: 10% niacinamide for sebum control and pore appearance.

products.name: The Ordinary Glycolic Acid 7% Toning Solution
products.description: 7% glycolic AHA toner — start 2x/week, do not combine with retinol.

products.name: CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion
products.description: Lightweight ceramide + niacinamide moisturizer for nightly use.

rows: sebum control, pore size, barrier repair

steps.label: week 1–2: foundation
steps.detail: cleanser + niacinamide + moisturizer + spf only. let skin adjust. no actives yet.

steps.label: week 3–4: add exfoliation
steps.detail: introduce glycolic acid 2x/week (mon + thu). watch for irritation. if skin feels tight, drop to 1x/week.

steps.label: week 5–8: consistency
steps.detail: routine is locked. skin barrier strengthens. texture begins to smooth. oiliness stabilizes.

steps.label: week 9–12: assess & adapt
steps.detail: visible texture improvement. if skin is good, consider adding a retinoid (0.25% or 0.5%) 1x/week pm. if still irritated, extend this phase.

items: buy the 6 products above (start with cleanser, niacinamide, moisturizer, spf)
set phone reminders: am routine (7:15am) and pm routine (11pm)
week 1: cleanser + niacinamide + moisturizer + spf only — no acids or retinoids
week 3: add glycolic acid 2x/week on non-consecutive nights
track texture in a mirror every sunday — take a photo for comparison
if skin feels tight/red after glycolic, reduce to 1x/week or pause
by week 8, skin should feel smoother and less reactive
after week 12, consider adding a low-dose retinoid (0.25%) 1x/week if texture persists
